Afghanistan.notes: Visa is not required in case born in Afghanistan or can proof that one of their parents is a national of Afghanistan or born in Afghanistan.. e-Visa: Visitors must arrive at Kabul International (KBL)..

Andorra.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area..

Argentina.notes: The AVE (High Speed Travel) is open to Bruneian citizens holding valid, current ordinary passports traveling to Argentina for tourism. To do so, they must hold a valid category B2/J/B1/O/P (P1-P2-P3)/E/H-1B visa issued by the United States of America..

Australia.notes: 90 days on each visit in 12-month period is granted..

Austria.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area..

Bahrain.notes: May also be obtained online in the form of an e-Visa..

Belarus.notes: Visas are issued on arrival at the Minsk International Airport if the support documents were submitted not later than 3 business days before expected date of arrival.. In the case of transit visas, these may be obtained on arrival with a hotel confirmation, return ticket and visa to a 3rd country for a maximum validity of 2 calendar days..

Belgium.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area..

Benin.notes: Must have an international vaccination certificate..

Bhutan.notes: Visa fee is USD 40 per person and visa application may be processed within 5 business days with duration of stay of 90 days.. e-Visa applicant is also subject to pay Sustainable Development Fee.

Bulgaria.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area..

Cameroon.notes: Holders of a pre-arranged approval issued by "Le Delegue General de la Surete" can obtain a visa on arrival..

Canada.notes: eTA required if arriving by air..

Colombia.notes: 90 days – extendable up to 180-days stay within a one-year period..

Côte d'Ivoire.notes: Must be arriving at Port Bouet Airport and hold an International Certificate of Vaccination..

Croatia.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area..

Cuba.notes: Can be extended up to 90 days with a fee..

Czech Republic.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area..

Denmark.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.

Estonia.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area..

Ethiopia.notes: e-Visa holders must arrive via Addis Ababa Bole International Airport..

Finland.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area..

France.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area..

Gabon.notes: e-Visa holders must arrive via Libreville International Airport..

Germany.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area..

Greece.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area..

Hungary.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area..

Iceland.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area..

India.notes: e-Visa holders must arrive via 32 designated airports or 5 designated seaports.. An Indian e-Tourist Visa may only be obtained twice within 1 calendar year.. Foreigners of Pakistani origin or who hold a Pakistani Passport are not eligible for an e-Visa. Foreigners who are not Pakistani nationals, but whose parents or grandparents (either paternal or maternal) were born in, or were permanent residents in Pakistan, are also not eligible for an e-Visa..

Italy.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area..

Jordan.notes: Extension of stay is possible for up to 60 days.

Kenya.notes: Applications can be submitted up to 90 days prior to travel and must be submitted at least 3 days in advance.. eTA fee is 32.50 USD.. Proof of reservation at the hotel where visitors plan to stay is required (if staying with friends, an invitation letter is also acceptable).. Yellow fever vaccination certificate is required if coming from endemic countries..

South Korea.notes: Bruneian citizens can enter South Korea as a short term visit (e.g., tours, visiting relatives or friends, attending simple meetings) up to 90 days without a visa, though you should remain aware of the quarantine requirements. You must also have an onward or return ticket. It is illegal to work on a tourist visa, whether as a teacher or in any other capacity.. You must be in possession of a Korea Electronic Travel Authorization (K-ETA) to enter Korea visa-free. You can complete your K-ETA application up to 24 hours before boarding your flight and it will be valid for 3 years from the date of approval. There is a small, non-refundable charge..

Latvia.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area..

Liechtenstein.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area..

Lithuania.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area..

Luxembourg.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area..

Malta.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area..

Mexico.notes: Visa is not required for Holders of a valid visa of Canada, US, UK or a Schengen State and Permanent residence of Canada, Chile, Colombia, Schengen State, Japan, UK, US. Entry may be refused by immigration officials for individuals who were previously denied a US visa, even if holding a valid Mexican visa..

Netherlands.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area..

New Zealand.notes: International Visitor Conservation and Tourism Levy must be paid upon requesting an Electronic Travel Authority.. Holders of an Australian Permanent Resident Visa or Resident Return Visa may be granted a New Zealand Resident Visa on arrival permitting indefinite stay (pursuant to the Trans-Tasman Travel Arrangement ), subject to meeting character requirements and obtaining an Electronic Travel Authority prior to departure. Such travellers are not required to pay the International Visitor Conservation and Tourism Levy..

Nigeria.notes: Holders of written e-visa approval issued by Immigration Authority Headquarters in Abuja, can obtain a visa on arrival..

Norway.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area..

Pakistan.notes: Online Visa eligible.. Issued in 7-10 business days..

Papua New Guinea.notes: Available at Gurney Airport (Alotau), Mount Hagen Airport, Port Moresby Airport and Tokua Airport (Rabaul)..

Poland.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area..

Portugal.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area..

Romania.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area..

Russia.notes: For a maximum total stay of 90 days within any 180 day period..

Seychelles.notes: Application can be submitted up to 30 days before travel.. Visitors must upload a reservation confirmation(s) for each visitor's location of stay in Seychelles.. Yellow fever vaccination certificate is required if coming from endemic countries.. Payment of the fee (EUR 10) by credit or debit card.. Valid for one journey only and it expires once exit the country..

Slovakia.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area..

Slovenia.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area..

South Sudan.notes: Obtainable online.. Printed visa authorization must be presented at the time of travel..

Spain.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area..

Suriname.notes: An entrance fee of USD 50 or EUR 50 must be paid online prior to arrival.. Multiple entry e-Visa is also available..

Sweden.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area..

Switzerland.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area..

United States.notes: On arrival from overseas; ESTA (valid for 1 years when issued) required if arriving by air or cruise ship.. ESTA is not required for Guam and Northern Mariana Islands..

Vietnam.notes: 90 days eVisa also available, 30 days visa free when visit Phu Quoc Island.

Mount Athos.stay: Special permit required (4 days: EUR 25 for Orthodox visitors, EUR 35 for non-Orthodox visitors, EUR 18 for students). There is a visitors' quota: maximum 100 Orthodox and 10 non-Orthodox per day and women are not allowed.

UN Buffer Zone in Cyprus.stay: Access Permit is required for travelling inside the zone, except Civil Use Areas.

Jan Mayen.stay: Permit issued by the local police required for staying for less than 24 hours and permit issued by the Norwegian police for staying for more than 24 hours.

South Ossetia.stay: Multiple entry visa to Russia and three-day prior notification are required to enter South Ossetia.

Eritrea outside Asmara.stay: To travel in the rest of the country, a Travel Permit for Foreigners is required (20 Eritrean nakfa ).

Saint Helena.stay: Visitor's Pass granted on arrival valid for 4/10/21/60/90 days for 12/14/16/20/25 pound sterling.

Tristan da Cunha.stay: Permission to land required for 15/30 pounds sterling (yacht/ship passenger) for Tristan da Cunha Island or 20 pounds sterling for Gough Island, Inaccessible Island or Nightingale Islands.

Somaliland.stay: 30 days for 30 US dollars, payable on arrival.

India PAP/RAP.stay: Protected Area Permit (PAP) required for whole states of Nagaland and Sikkim and parts of states Manipur, Arunachal Pradesh, Uttaranchal, Jammu and Kashmir, Rajasthan, Himachal Pradesh. Restricted Area Permit (RAP) required for all of Andaman and Nicobar Islands and parts of Sikkim. Some of these requirements are occasionally lifted for a year.

Kish Island.stay: Visitors to Kish Island do not require a visa.

North Korea outside Pyongyang.stay: People are not allowed to leave the capital city, tourists can only leave the capital with a governmental tourist guide (no independent moving)

Palestine.stay: Arrival by sea to Gaza Strip not allowed.

Gorno-Badakhshan Autonomous Province.stay: OIVR permit required (15+5 Tajikistani Somoni ) and another special permit (free of charge) is required for Lake Sarez.

Tibet Autonomous Region.stay: Tibet Travel Permit required (10 US Dollars ).

French West Indies.stay: 90 days. French West Indies refers to Martinique, Guadeloupe, Saint Martin and Saint Barthélemy.

Galápagos.stay: Online pre-registration is required. Transit Control Card must also be obtained at the airport prior to departure.

Pitcairn Islands.stay: 14 days visa free and landing fee USD 35 or tax of USD 5 if not going ashore.

United States Minor Outlying Islands.stay: Special permits required for Baker Island, Howland Island, Jarvis Island, Johnston Atoll, Kingman Reef, Midway Atoll, Palmyra Atoll and Wake Island.

Falkland Islands.stay: British Overseas Territory visa is required.

South Georgia and the South Sandwich Isl.stay: Pre-arrival permit from the Commissioner required (72 hours/1 month for 110/160 pounds sterling ).

Mexico.notes: Visa is not required for Holders of a valid visa of Canada, US, UK or a Schengen State and Permanent residence of Canada, Chile, Colombia, Schengen State, Japan, UK, US. Entry may be refused by immigration officials for individuals who were previously denied a US visa, even if holding a valid Mexican visa..
